079 = Cost report days. (Handled in MIA15) 

080 = Outlier days. (Handled in QTY, QTY01=OU) 

081 = Discharges 

082 = PIP days 

083 = Total visits 

084 = Capital adjustment. (Handled in MIA) 

085 = Patient interest adjustment (Use only group code PR). Notes: Only use when the payment of

086 = Statutory adjustment. Notes: Duplicative of code 045 

087 = Transfer amount 

088 = Adjustment amount represents collection against
